canonicalRules.analysisBaselineUsage: Use analysisBaselinePromptVersion for all non-pilot analyses and for source-aware control runs with liveDataEnabled=false.
canonicalRules.analysisLivePilotUsage: Use analysisLiveBtcPilotPromptVersion for eligible BTC live-data pilot analyses whenever the live pilot path is invoked, even if sources degrade or return unavailable.
canonicalRules.followUpUsage: Use followUpPromptVersion for every saved follow-up generated from a persisted analysis record.

notes: Use the canonical promptVersion strings above for all new analyses, follow-ups, eval reports, and baseline summaries.
Historical artifact directory names may retain older sprint labels, but current lineage references should point back to these canonical prompt versions.
Legacy promptVersion labels may remain in older historical records, but current baseline, BTC live pilot, and follow-up lineage must use the canonical strings above.
